overview: HBeam is a Hoosat blockchain messenger and wallet app — a feature-rich clone of kbeam.app rebuilt for the Hoosat network. It supports wallet generation and import, HTN payments, private messaging with full media support (images, videos, files, voice notes), typing indicators, and presence.
features: Send and receive text, image, video, file, and voice note messages in private chats
Voice recorder with start, stop, preview, and send — audio player inline in chat bubbles
Upload progress bar, retry on failure, and fallback states for media
Image thumbnails inline in chat; file/video messages show name, size, and download link
HTN payments sent directly inside chat conversations
Wallet generation, import, and connect using Hoosat SDK
Contact management with presence (online/offline) and typing indicators
Polling-based real-time message sync every 8 seconds
Fully persistent — all messages and media reload correctly after refresh
